title: HR Business Operation – Interface Ops
description:
Job Description

·      The HR Business Operation – Interface Ops / LLM Operations Engineer is responsible for managing and supporting daily system integrations between e-HR systems and interfacing platforms across OSIT/WOG environments.

·       The role ensures end-to-end operability, data integrity, and stability of HR interfaces, including batch jobs, middleware integrations, and manual data transfers.

·       The position requires strong coordination skills, technical analysis capabilities, and operational discipline in a multi-stakeholder environment.

 Key Responsibilities 

·      Interface & Integration Operations Manage all daily system integrations between e-HR and interfacing systems, ensuring successful and timely data exchanges.

·       Track multiple concurrent daily activities and coordinate with Subject Matter Experts (SMEs), middleware teams, interfacing counterpart systems, and other suppliers to ensure end-to-end interface operability.

·       Manage all incoming and outgoing system interfaces from OSIT/WOG systems, including: External interfaces External projects eServices MINDEF/SAF applications on Internet portals and Commercial Cloud platforms Operations Support & Monitoring Provide daily operations support, including batch job monitoring, error detection, and resolution.

·       Monitor interface error logs and ensure timely investigation and remediation of issues.

·       Perform manual data uploads and transfers when required by the Authority.

·       Change Requests, Data Analysis & Issue Resolution Provide inputs and support for the development and deployment of Change Requests (CRs) related to interfaces, including participation in requirements gathering and User Acceptance Testing (UAT).

·       Profile and analyse data to identify issues and discrepancies using approved software tools such as: Microsoft Office tools (especially Excel) SAP programs or queries SQL (as provided by the Authority) Conduct root cause analysis for interface and data-related issues and propose effective solutions.

·       Provide analysis and consultation services to OSIT/WOG systems to resolve operational and data-related issues.

·       Coordinate with data owners for HR data matters requiring man-in-the-loop decisions.

·       Coordination, Reporting & Governance Perform secretariat duties for meetings involving internal teams and external stakeholders.

·       Prepare operational reports, management updates, and presentation materials (slides) for various forums and meetings.

·       Maintain project resource assignments, track progress, and initiate corrective actions to address deviations from plans and keep projects on track.

·       Documentation & Continuous Improvement Review, propose, and update operational and technical documentation where necessary 

·      including but not limited to: Standard Operating Procedures (SOPs) Authority approval documents (e.g. file upload/download approvals) Data Catalogue and related artefacts Education Qualification At least a Diploma or Degree in Computer Science, Information Systems, Science, Engineering, or equivalent. 

Required Competencies Technical & Analytical Skills

·       Good knowledge of information technology, particularly in SAP HCM ERP or HCM SaaS environments.

·       Good understanding of data design and data structures within SAP HCM ERP or HCM SaaS.

·       Demonstrated ability to investigate issues, identify root causes, and propose effective remediation solutions.

·       Proficiency in SQL programming is preferred.

·       Strong competency in Microsoft Excel, including advanced functions for data analysis.

·       Professional & Interpersonal Skills Strong planning, coordination, and stakeholder management skills.

·       Excellent writing, verbal communication, and presentation skills.

·       Strong sense of ownership; responsible and conscientious in operational delivery. 

·      Resourceful, independent, responsive, and proactive.

·       Good team player with the ability to work across multiple parties and suppliers.

·       Required Working Experience Minimum 2 years of working experience in Information Technology.

·       Experience in SAP HCM ERP is preferred.

·       Experience in operations support, including end-user support, troubleshooting, and testing, is preferred.

·       Hands-on SQL working experience and competency in SQL programming is preferred.
